name: Red Lobster Inspired Garlic Cheese Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart mixing bowl, combine the milk, mayonnaise, sugar, and self-rising flour. Beat on high speed with an electric mixer for almost a minute until smooth and completely combined.
2. Using a rubber bowl scraper, streak the dough with the shredded cheese. The batter should not be thin enough to pour; if necessary, add only enough additional flour so that the batter will drop from a spoon.
3. Drop the batter into 10 paper-lined muffin tins or a greater number of small muffin cups (muffins tend to triple in size when baked; fill lightly).
4. Melt the butter; mix in the garlic powder, and brush the tops of the dough with melted butter.
5. Optionally, sprinkle an additional teaspoon of shredded cheese on each muffin.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown. Cool in the pan on a rack for 30 minutes before serving.
These biscuits are best enjoyed freshly baked and hot.
